title: Champagne shalwar kameez for a reception
concept_summary: A refined, fully covered reception concept with a long straight raw-silk kameez and a tapered shalwar, finished with fine rose-gold tilla and a head-draped dupatta for a modest, elegant line.

garment_breakdown.overall_form: A long straight kameez over a tapered shalwar, with a dupatta over the head.
garment_breakdown.silhouette: A clean, columnar kameez falling straight over a slim shalwar.
garment_breakdown.drape_or_layering: The dupatta is draped over the head and down both sides.
garment_breakdown.key_proportions: The long kameez lengthens the line over the tapered shalwar.

colour_story.palette_summary: A soft champagne warmed by rose gold.
colour_story.placement: Champagne fills the kameez with rose gold defining the fine work.
colour_story.rationale: Muted metallics read as understated evening reception tones.

fabrics_and_texture.finish_and_movement: A crisp raw silk with a subtle texture and a clean, structured fall.

embellishment_plan.density: Minimal, restrained work limited to borders and cuffs.
embellishment_plan.restraint_notes: The surface stays largely plain so the fine work reads clearly.

coverage_and_drape.neckline: A high, closed neckline for full coverage.
coverage_and_drape.back_and_midriff: The long kameez fully covers the torso, back and midriff.
coverage_and_drape.head_covering: The dupatta is worn over the head throughout.
coverage_and_drape.dupatta_or_saree_drape: A single dupatta draped over the head and down both sides.

cultural_context.regional_direction: A broad Delhi formalwear influence guides the clean, covered elegance.
interpretation_notes: Treated as one broad direction rather than a strict rule.
safeguards: Modest, full coverage choices are honoured, not overridden.

styling_notes: Keep jewellery fine and rose-toned to match the tilla.
construction_caveats: This is a concept visualisation only and is not a sewing pattern.
It does not guarantee that the garment can be constructed exactly as shown.
image_alt_text: A model in a fully covered champagne shalwar kameez with a head-draped dupatta for a reception.
